text:
Same here on 10.2 (amd64, generic, livedvd)

for bxe0

ERROR: Invalid VLAN (57005)
ERROR: Enumerated function 0 is marked as hidden
Found 10GBase-CX4 media
Using defaults for TSO: 65518/35/2048
Ethernet address: de:ad:de:ad:de:ad

for bxe1

ERROR: md_mode=SD functions 1 and 3 have the same ovlan (0)
ERROR: No Ethernet address programmed!
Found 10GBase-CX4 media
Using defaults for TSO: 65518/35/2048
MSI-X vectors Requested 3 and Allocated 3
